title: crambe orientalis
intro: Crambe orientalis, also known as sea kale, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease and certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Crambe orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions. In addition to its medicinal uses, Crambe orientalis is also a popular ingredient in some herbal remedies and supplements, which are available in various forms, including capsules and powders.
